title: Account-level Genie One (Beta)
body: Account-level Genie One is now available in Beta. Users can now discover and interact with AI/BI dashboards, Genie Spaces, and Databricks Apps from all workspaces in their account from a single entry point. Account-level Genie One provides a unified homepage, cross-workspace search, and recommendations and favorites across workspaces. See [Use Genie One](/aws/en/genie-one/genie).
